reviews.review_description: Its not a bad game but you get what you pay for and the tracking could use work. Aiming with the bow is iffy at best

Bow fishing, which is awesome in itself, scenery, relaxing and peaceful atmosphere.
Love that you can drive the boat around, adds to the immersion.

Few things I picked up on that would be great if it was adjusted or added on to.

Tutorial showing you how to use the bow and reel in.  There’s a box menu at the beginning that gives you a couple of short sentences on operation and that’s it.

A smooth locomotion movement would be great, it’s a bit limiting by only being in certain spots and awkward trying to drop fish in to the basket.

Once I realised you could drive the boat I moved to a new location but there were no fish.  Was I not meant to move until a certain time?

I’m no artist in the slightest, I couldn’t draw a banana if I tried but I did hope that the mountain and sky scenery had more realism, I’m sure you could get away with it being it’s a small ish environment.

Reeling in the fish works fine but once it reaches you it would be good if it docked automatically to the bow or something, trying to pick up the arrow or fish is extremely awkward and if you do pick it up on one of the weird extreme angles you can’t place it in the bow properly.  

Perhaps some difficulty levels would be appropriate for somewhat visually impaired folk where the 3 levels would have different size hitboxes, I.e those with not the best aim can still have a gratifying experience.

I enjoyed the game and look forward to updates on it.

Thanks for reading my wall!

reviews.review_title: My passion sport in real life is here
reviews.review_description: I love bowfishing in real life, it's my passion and was just inform of this game. I'm all in 💯 precent in support and promotion. Wow like a dream come true now in VR . Thank u so much developers
